text:
36th year, children will be born.
Between his 40th and 43rd year, his parents will die.
Between his 42nd and 44th year, the native's monetary position will
improve and his wife will acquire a house.
Before his 63rd year, there will a highly prosperous period. Saturn, the
planet for profession, is in conjunction with Jupiter. This indicates a teaching
profession.
Then comes the Sun iri Virgo with Rahu in the 12th indicating that the
native will benefit by his father's directions. Then come Mercury and Venus
in Libra. This indicates profit through cultural activities and through the
talents of the native.
